_comment: Machine-readable incubation-package contract enforced by scripts/incubation-gate.sh. Human-facing doc: ideas/PACKAGE.md. An idea PR stays red until every required artifact below is present, marked `status: final`, carries its required section headers, and has no leftover template placeholders. A green gate + code-owner approval is the authorization to begin work.
